TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Sotolo o koli : o sakasepat kasasa'er ko 'orip ilaloma' no kasasa'er-no'orip a faco no Indo, o maomahay, ikakaay a misatofangay ato misamoraday konini.itiya ho o matayalay to ma'acekan tayal tora mipacokay to 'a'adopen ato mipatayay to tamdaw a tayal ato mifalahay to tai' ko tayal, orasaka, cowako tatefingen koninian tamadaw hananay. Pinengnengan Kasasa'er no 'orip Polomen Satili Fise Tatiri'an a tilid
S.PHON: so~uto~uɾo~u o~u ko~uɾi : o~u sakasəpat kasasaʡər ko~u ʡo~urip iɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u kasasaʡər-no~uʡo~urip a faʦo~u no~u inɬ~ɮo~u, o~u mao~umaħaj, ikakaaj a misato~ufaŋaj ato~u misamo~uraɬ~ɮaj ko~unini.itija ħo~u o~u matajaɾaj to~u maʡaʦəkan tajaɾ to~ura mipaʦo~ukaj to~u ʡaʡaɬ~ɮo~upən ato~u mipatajaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw a tajaɾ ato~u mifaɾaħaj to~u taiʡ ko~u tajaɾ, o~urasaka, ʦo~uwako~u tatəfiŋən ko~uninian tamaɬ~ɮaw ħananaj. pinəŋnəŋan kasasaʡər no~u ʡo~urip po~uɾo~umən satiɾi fisə tatiriʡan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ
S.FORM: Sotolo o koli : o sakasepat kasasa'er ko 'orip ilaloma' no kasasa'er-no'orip a faco no Indo, o maomahay, ikakaay a misatofangay ato misamoraday konini.itiya ho o matayalay to ma'acekan tayal tora mipacokay to 'a'adopen ato mipatayay to tamdaw a tayal ato mifalahay to tai' ko tayal, orasaka, cowako tatefingen koninian tamadaw hananay. Pinengnengan Kasasa'er no 'orip Polomen Satili Fise Tatiri'an a tilid
S.PHON: so~uto~uɾo~u o~u ko~uɾi : o~u sakasəpat kasasaʡər ko~u ʡo~urip iɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u kasasaʡər-no~uʡo~urip a faʦo~u no~u inɬ~ɮo~u, o~u mao~umaħaj, ikakaaj a misato~ufaŋaj ato~u misamo~uraɬ~ɮaj ko~unini.itija ħo~u o~u matajaɾaj to~u maʡaʦəkan tajaɾ to~ura mipaʦo~ukaj to~u ʡaʡaɬ~ɮo~upən ato~u mipatajaj to~u tamɬ~ɮaw a tajaɾ ato~u mifaɾaħaj to~u taiʡ ko~u tajaɾ, o~urasaka, ʦo~uwako~u tatəfiŋən ko~uninian tamaɬ~ɮaw ħananaj. pinəŋnəŋan kasasaʡər no~u ʡo~urip po~uɾo~umən satiɾi fisə tatiriʡan a tiɾiɬ~ɮ
